situation: audit-2026-07-03-013 finding PD-H001: resume-next-batch.js L51-55 computes elapsedMs = Date.now() - server updated_at. Client/server clock skew can make elapsedMs negative (server ahead), bypassing observation period entirely, or permanently block if server is behind by > observe_minutes.
action: Added clock-skew defense inline in resume-next-batch.js Gate 1: (1) NaN guard on updated_at parse with explicit error exit; (2) negative elapsedMs clamped to 0 with WARNING log so forward server skew cannot bypass observation; (3) 30s tolerance window retained without auto-approve. No new dependencies, no public-interface change (route-fix).
